metadata.description: Additional requirements for big text file analysis features in a native macOS Notepad++-style Rust editor.
metadata.relationship_to_main_srs: This is an add-on specification to the main FastPad SRS. It focuses on huge file viewing, read-only analysis mode, logs, filters, queries, pipelines, and text intelligence.

design_principles: Analysis must work without loading the whole file into RAM.
Read-only analysis must be the default for huge files.
Search, filter, stats, extraction, and pipelines must be streaming where possible.
All long-running tasks must be cancellable.
Original files must not be modified by analysis features.
UI must remain responsive while analysis runs.
Results should appear progressively, not only after full completion.
Features should feel like GUI versions of Unix tools: grep, awk, sort, uniq, wc, tail, less.

modules.name: Read-Only Analysis Mode
modules.purpose: A maximum-performance mode for inspecting very large files without enabling expensive editing features.

requirements.title: Automatically enable Read-Only Analysis Mode for huge files
requirements.description: When a file exceeds configured size threshold, open it in read-only analysis mode by default.
acceptance_criteria: Files above threshold open without loading entire content into RAM.
Editing commands are disabled or hidden.
Status bar clearly shows Read-Only Analysis Mode.
User can explicitly override mode only when safe.
implementation_notes: Disable full syntax highlighting, minimap, full indexing, and full line counting by default.

test_cases.name: BTA-001-001 basic behavior
test_cases.expected: Feature works as specified.

test_cases.name: BTA-001-001 huge file behavior
test_cases.expected: Feature remains responsive on large files.

requirements.description: Manual toggle for Read-Only Analysis Mode
acceptance_criteria: User can use: Manual toggle for Read-Only Analysis Mode.

Feature must fail safely with a clear user-visible error.

repo_additions.crates/analysis_mode: Read-only analysis mode capabilities and policy decisions
repo_additions.crates/streaming_search: Chunked literal/regex search with live results
repo_additions.crates/log_mode: Log detection, log level parsing, tail/follow mode

implementation_rules: Do not implement big-file analysis by loading full file into memory.
Use byte offsets as stable references where possible.
Use lazy line index for huge files.
Use progress events for every scan.
Use cancellation tokens for every background task.
Use bounded result buffers and spill-to-disk if necessary.
Never allow analysis features to mutate original file unless user explicitly exports or converts.
Keep analysis engines UI-independent and unit-testable.

traceability_index.title: Automatically enable Read-Only Analysis Mode for huge files
Manual toggle for Read-Only Analysis Mode
Disable destructive editing commands in analysis mode
Allow copy, search, filter, bookmark, and export in analysis mode
Show active optimizations in mode banner
Allow safe conversion from analysis mode to editable mode
Warn before converting huge file to editable mode
Show file name, path, size, modified time, owner, and permissions
Show detected encoding and BOM status
Estimate total line count lazily for huge files
Show longest line and average line length
Detect likely file type: log, CSV, JSON, XML, SQL, source, markdown, binary
Show warning for very long lines
Show statistics progress when still scanning
Start search before full file is indexed
Show live result count while searching
Allow navigation to results before search completes
Support result limit with continue option
Allow filters to be saved and reused
Support field comparisons for structured logs
Support timestamp comparisons when timestamps detected
Compile query into streaming execution plan
Highlight ERROR, WARN, INFO, DEBUG, TRACE levels
Pause follow mode without closing file
CSV table view for large CSV files
CSV column sort using streaming/indexed mode
Show line length, byte offset, hash, whitespace, and Unicode details
Show first/last occurrence for selected token
Mask sensitive values in preview when configured
Find most common IPs, URLs, errors, IDs using pattern categories
Allow approximate counting for huge files
Persist bookmarks in session without modifying source file
Show file size and mapped bytes
Warn when memory budget is exceeded
